description: Core AI-service endpoints directly used by the Vibe Booking LangGraph agent. These are internal backend tools (called with X-Service-Key, not user JWT) that power AI-driven search, booking creation, payments, and budget estimation from the chat flow.

tools.name: ai_search_trips
tools.description: AI-native trip search using a natural language query. Use this instead of list_trips when the user's intent needs semantic matching (e.g., 'I want a relaxing beach trip for 5 days under $200'). The backend translates the query into structured results. Returns up to 5 matching trips.

query.description: Natural language search intent from the user (e.g., 'temple tour in Siem Reap for 3 days')

locale.description: Language locale of the user's request

tools.returns: Array of matching trip objects suitable for the AI to present to the user

tools.name: ai_create_booking_hold
tools.description: Create a multi-item booking hold on behalf of the user from the AI chat. Use after the user confirms they want to book. Supports mixed bookings (TRIP + HOTEL + TRANSPORT + GUIDE) in a single call. Returns booking_id, reference, hold_expires_at, and total_price_usd.

user_id.description: UUID of the authenticated user making the booking

items.description: List of items to include in the booking

metadata.description: Type-specific booking data (e.g., check-in/check-out dates, guest count)

tools.name: ai_generate_payment_qr
tools.description: Generate a QR code for payment via Bakong (Cambodia's national payment) or ABA bank within the chat interface. Use after creating a booking hold and the user chooses QR payment. Display the QR code image in the chat for the user to scan.

booking_id.description: Booking UUID for which to generate the QR payment

provider.description: Payment provider. BAKONG = Cambodia national payment system, ABA = ABA bank

tools.returns: qr_data (raw QR string), qr_image_url (displayable image), amount_usd, expiry (datetime)

tools.name: ai_estimate_budget
tools.description: Estimate the total budget for a trip using a natural language query. Use when the user asks how much a trip will cost or wants a budget breakdown. Returns min/max cost with breakdown by category (accommodation, transportation, meals, entry_fees, guide, miscellaneous).

query.description: Natural language budget request (e.g., '3 days in Siem Reap for 2 people, mid-range budget')

currency.description: Preferred currency for the estimate (default: USD)

tools.returns: total_min_usd, total_max_usd, breakdown array (category, min_usd, max_usd, notes)

tools.name: ai_websocket_chat
tools.description: Upgrade to a WebSocket connection for real-time bidirectional AI chat. This is the primary connection the Vibe Booking agent maintains with the user. Use Authorization: Bearer <jwt> and X-Session-Id: <uuid> headers on upgrade. Messages are structured JSON objects.
